title: About ConvertBase.app
metaDescription: Learn what ConvertBase.app offers, how the platform works, and how we use cookies, Google Analytics and Google AdSense.
heading: About ConvertBase.app
content: ConvertBase.app is a multilingual platform for practical online tools such as converters, calculators, generators, image tools and text utilities.
Our goal is simple: publish fast, focused pages that solve one clear task at a time while keeping the experience lightweight, accessible and easy to use on any device.

sections.title: What the platform offers
paragraphs: Each tool is designed to answer a specific need with a clear input, a direct result and supporting explanations that help users understand the output.
We aim to keep our pages useful for everyday visitors, students, creators, marketers and developers without requiring sign-up or unnecessary steps.

sections.title: How ConvertBase.app is supported
paragraphs: We may use Google Analytics to understand traffic patterns and improve usability across languages and device types.
We may also display ads through Google AdSense to support the ongoing operation of the platform. Cookies can be used for essential site behavior, analytics and advertising.

sections.title: Privacy and trust
paragraphs: We try to minimize data collection and build tools that work directly in the browser whenever possible.
For questions about privacy, cookies, advertising or platform policies, contact the operator of ConvertBase.app at contact@convertbase.app.
